author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #20 - Special Edition: State of the Economy is confirmed! Join us this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

The Atlas Brew is a Star Atlas Community Event. Made by the community, for the community   

It happens every Wednesday in the Voice Chat channel   

This week we are talking about the State of the Star Atlas Economy! We have two very special guests: Eric and Steven from the Star Atlas Econ Team! 
See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!

Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/993884233393242152
